config.script:
"""
	Written By: Sagar Iparkar
	Written Date: 10/06/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Start/Complete orders from screen
	"""
	try:
		from java.text import SimpleDateFormat
		from java.util import Date
		
		action = self.view.params.value
		rowData = self.view.params.rowData
		system.perspective.print("rowData"+str(rowData))
		areaId  = self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId
		lineId = self.session.custom.CurrentLineId
		workstationId = self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId
		AreaName = self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName
		LineName = self.session.custom.CurrentLineName
		WorkStationName = self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
		system.perspective.print("in start script")
		shiftdetails = str(Project_VECV.WashingMachine.Shift.getShiftName(lineId))
		shiftdetails = shiftdetails.split('-')
		if len(shiftdetails) == 0:
			state = "success"
			message = 'Shift Not Configured'
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")        
		else:
#		areaId  = 23
#		lineId =38
#		workstationId =359
			shiftId = shiftdetails[1]
			shiftCode = shiftdetails[0]
			userId = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
			bomId = rowData['m_BOM_id']
			M_BOMNumber = rowData['M_BOMNumber']
			orderNumber = rowData['order_number']
			serialNumber= rowData['serial_number']
			gearRation= rowData['GearRation']
			orderStatusId = 0
			if int(action) == 1:
				eventId = 3
				message = 'Number Punching Started'
				orderStatusId = 1
				try:
					stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
					state='Info'
					userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
					ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
					data="Number punching started for Serial Number %s "%serialNumber
					Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)
				except:
					pass
#				try:
#					params1 = {'AreaID':areaId,'LineID':lineId}
#					result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Shift/getShiftDetails",params1)
#					shiftCode=str(result[0]['Code'])
#				except:	
#					shiftCode='A'
				
	#			Project_VECV.TextFileRead.FileRead.fileWrite(serialNumber,gearRation,M_BOMNumber,shiftCode)
	#			Project_VECV.TextFileRead.FileRead.fileWrite(serialNumber,gearRation)
				
				### Share details with PLC to punch data on plate
				newserialNumber=serialNumber.split('-')[0]
				system.perspective.print(gearRation)
				system.perspective.print(M_BOMNumber)
				system.perspective.print(serialNumber)
				system.perspective.print(shiftCode)
				now = Date()
				formatter = SimpleDateFormat("dd/MM/yyyy")
				formatted_date = formatter.format(now)
				tagDate=formatted_date
				system.perspective.print("Date set for NumberPunching=%s"%tagDate)
				try:
					stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
					state='Info'
					userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
					ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
					data="Data sent to PLC for Serial Number %s gearRation %s M_BOMNumber %s shiftCode %s Date %s"%(serialNumber,gearRation,M_BOMNumber,shiftCode,tagDate)
					Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)
				except:
					pass
				
				system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/Number_Punching/MODEL"%(AreaName,LineName,WorkStationName), M_BOMNumber)
				system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/Number_Punching/SERIAL_NUMBER"%(AreaName,LineName,WorkStationName), newserialNumber)
				system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/Number_Punching/Shift"%(AreaName,LineName,WorkStationName), shiftCode)
				system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/Number_Punching/Gear_Ratio"%(AreaName,LineName,WorkStationName), gearRation)
				system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/Number_Punching/Date"%(AreaName,LineName,WorkStationName), tagDate)
				
			else:
				eventId = 5
				message = 'Number Punching Completed'
				try:
					stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
					state='Info'
					userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
					ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
					data="Number punching Completed for Serial Number %s "%serialNumber
					Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)
				except:
					pass
		
			params = {'Area_Id':areaId,'Line_Id':lineId,'WorkStation_Id':workstationId,'Event_Id':eventId,'BOM_Id':bomId,'Status_Id':orderStatusId,'OperatorID':userId,'CreatedBy':userId,'OrderNumber':orderNumber,'M_BOMNumber':M_BOMNumber,'serialNumber':serialNumber}	
			system.perspective.print("params number punching" +str(params))
			result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/NumberPunching/addUpdateNumberPunching",params)
			if str(result) == '1':
				result=str(result)
				system.perspective.print("message " +str(result)+'  '+str(message))
				state = "success"
	
			else:
				message = 'failed'
				system.perspective.print("message " +str(result)+'  '+str(message))
				state = "warning"
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")        
			system.perspective.sendMessage("OrderTableRefresh", scope = "page")
			
			#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='StartButton'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Templates/numberpunching/numberpunching')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onAction  -> StartCompleteButton')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
